label.files_stella_alert: Was your file opened before January 15, 2025?
label.files_stella_alert_detail: If you can't find it, check its creation date. If it opened before that date, look for it here.
label.one_step_file: You're just one step away from opening your file!
label.one_step_file_detail: Press `Import` to access your file. (You'll only need to do this once.)
label.input_search: Pax file number, reference, last name or passport.
label.select_multiple_to_delete: Select multiple hotels or services to cancel
label.alert_modify_date: Changing the file date affects all services and hotels.
label.save_time_passengers: Fill in the details of your passengers now and expedite the purchase of tickets to guarantee their entry to Machu Picchu on the desired date.
label.save_time_flights: Fill in your passenger details now and speed up the scheduling of your transfers.

button.service_protected: Service with protected rates has an up-to-date cost that exceeds the initial protection.
button.file_protected: Negotiations have finished entering the rates for all file services.

message.room_quantity_selected_error: The number of rooms are required. Please try again.
message.destiny_error: Please select a destination to continue.
message.date_range_error: Please select a date range to continue.
message.select_passengers: Select the passengers to continue with the search.
message.title_activate: To activate the file, you must review the communications generated by hotels and services.
message.title_to_quote: To change the date and activate the file you must go to quote.
message.preferred_activate: You want to activate the file with
message.change_date: All changes can be made from
message.alert_change_statement: This modification led to a change in the statement.
message.confirm_statement: Do you agree with the modification, or do you prefer to modify it manually?
message.price_by_room_type_and_pax: Net price by room type and type of passenger
message.hotel_no_confirmed: The selected hotel does not have a confirmation code. Please enter it to continue.
message.remove_flight: Remember that after proceeding you will not be able to recover flight information.
message.title_flight_incompleted: General information about the incomplete flight
message.content_flight_incompleted: You must complete the information for the cities, both for arrival and departure to continue with the assignment of passengers.
message.add_additional_information_to_the_file: Add additional information for the file
message.the_note_will_be: The note will be recorded for all services on the selected day (s)
message.the_note_will_be_requirement: Once completed, the request will be recorded for all services on the selected day (s)
message.date_range: You must select a date range
message.housing_is_required: The name of the accommodation is required
message.housing_characters: Accommodation must have at least 10 characters
message.address_is_required: The address of the accommodation is required
message.question_delete_note: Are you sure to delete this note?
message.content_system_failed: We have detected a conflict in the reservation system. Please don't add more services until further notice.
message.report_system_failed: To fix this, report the following to IT
message.thanks_system_failed: We'll let you know when it's resolved. Thank you for your patience.
message.remove_service: Remember that after proceeding you will not be able to recover the service information.
message.no_communication_service: The selected services have no communication with providers.
message.failed_selected_paxs: The number of passengers selected does not match the number to be assigned.
message.no_confirmation_hotel: Some rooms do not have a confirmation code
message.no_confirmation_room: You don't have a confirmation code
message.content_loading_maca: Aurora BOT is working on the request, in a moment you will be able to view the information in the program. You can continue working on your file while your reservation is being completed.
message.empty_content_notifications: There are no notifications sent associated with this hotel.
message.processing_file: FILE in the process of being updated
message.content_processing_file: The FILE is temporarily locked while updates are being made. This process may take a few moments. We'll let you know as soon as it's available again.

error.process_aurora_3: An error occurred while processing the FILE (A3).
error.status_cron_job_reservation_stella: Failed to process the FILE in STELLA.

notification.accommodations_success: The layout of the itinerary was updated.
notification.amounts_success: The amount of the itinerary was updated.
notification.cancel_itinerary_success: The request to cancel the itinerary was completed.
notification.confirmation_code_success: The itinerary confirmation code has been updated.
notification.date_success: The date of the itinerary has been updated.
notification.flight_item_success: The flight sub-item has been successfully saved.
notification.flight_remove_success: The flight has been successfully deleted.
notification.flight_city_success: The flight city has been successfully updated.
notification.master_services_success: The master services of the aggregated services were successfully executed.
notification.sent_ope_success: The itinerary was sent to OPE.
notification.passengers_success: The passenger list has been updated.
notification.schedule_success: The schedule of the Itinerary has been updated.
notification.statement_success: The FILE statement has been updated.
notification.status_success: The status of the FILE has been updated.
notification.update_success: The FILE information has been updated.
notification.vip_success: The FILE (VIP) information has been updated.
notification.content_processing_reservation: The reservation request is in process.
notification.user_disconnected: You were kicked out of FILE #
notification.kick_from_file: He expelled you from the FILE
notification.page_inactive: The page was inactive for a while, it would be advisable to refresh the screen to bring up the latest changes to the FILE.
notification.content_connection_lost: The session has been lost, the page will be refreshed to log back in.
notification.itinerary_update_remote: The itinerary was automatically adjusted to reflect updates on linked services
